title: KB Artifact Linked
description: Emitted by `kb link <plan> --session <id>` when a session artifact is associated with a plan entry. Enables downstream consumers (deer-flow, hearth-loom) to track which sessions contributed evidence to which plans. UNCONSUMED (2026-07 zombie-event audit): no consumer was found anywhere in hearth, tengine, or tachyonac-engine — currently write-only telemetry. The 'downstream consumers' language above describes aspirational/intended use, not a verified handler; a deer-flow-side consumer was not independently re-verified in this pass and is outside this audit's scope. Not removed (cheap, harmless bus write that may become useful later); flagged so the registry stops implying something reads it today. See nervous-bus schemas/CHANNELS.md for current status.

entry_id.description: UUID v7 of the vault plan entry

artifact_uri.description: URI of the linked artifact, e.g. tengine-session://<dir>, bd://<bead_id>

session.description: Session identifier (bare ID, not URI) — populated when artifact_type=session

wave.description: Optional wave label (e.g. 'W1-A') for linking to a specific dispatch wave

project.description: Project namespace of the plan entry
